details.productUrlName: Expressive Iteration JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand, put one of them on the bottom of your library, and exile one of them. You may play the exiled card this turn.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"Every piece you create is the result of a thousand choices. Follow your heart, and you cannot choose wrong."
—Nassari, Prismari dean
